description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image with three stages: test, build, and deploy. In the build stage add a "Build SCSS" job that runs "npm ci" then "npm run build-scss" and stores lib/theme.css as an artifact. In the test stage add three jobs: "ESLint" runs "npm i" then "npx eslint ."; "Stylelint" runs "npm i" then "npx stylelint ."; and "Test code" runs "npm ci" then "npm test". In the deploy stage add a "Now Deploy" job that runs only on the master branch, sets the environment name to Zeit NOW with URL https://listas.now.sh, and executes "npm i --no-save now", "npx now deploy --token=$NOW_TOKEN", and "npx now alias --token=$NOW_TOKEN" to deploy to ZEIT Now.
